name: broad-exception-catch
description: Avoid bare 'except' catching all exceptions - this hides errors and makes debugging impossible

name: empty-except-block
description: Do not silently ignore exceptions - this hides critical errors

name: catching-generic-exception
description: Avoid catching generic Exception; use specific exceptions instead

name: swallowed-exception
description: Exceptions should be logged or handled explicitly, not silently ignored

name: lost-exception-context
description: Re-raising exceptions should preserve context to maintain debugging information

name: exception-used-for-flow-control
description: Do not use exceptions for normal control flow - use conditionals instead

name: missing-from-in-raise
description: Use 'raise ... from e' to preserve original exception traceback

name: mutable-default-list-argument
description: Do not use mutable lists as default arguments - they persist across calls

name: mutable-default-dict-argument
description: Do not use mutable dicts as default arguments - they persist across calls

name: mutable-default-set-argument
description: Do not use mutable sets as default arguments - they persist across calls

name: function-call-in-default-argument
description: Default arguments should not call functions - they execute at module load time

name: index-out-of-bounds-access
description: Do not access index equal to array length - causes IndexError

name: loop-boundary-off-by-one
description: Ensure loops include all intended elements

name: string-slicing-off-by-one
description: Check slicing boundaries carefully to avoid missing or extra characters

name: binary-search-bound-error
description: High index should be len(array)-1, not len(array)

name: invalid-index-range-check
description: Upper bound should be exclusive (<), not inclusive (<=)

name: high-cyclomatic-complexity
description: Function has too many nested conditions - refactor into smaller functions

name: too-many-branches
description: Too many conditional branches reduce readability and maintainability

name: long-method-multiple-responsibilities
description: Function does too many things - violates single responsibility principle

name: too-many-parameters
description: Function has too many parameters - use config object instead

name: unused-imports
description: Remove unused imports - they clutter code and slow startup

name: unused-parameters
description: Function parameters should be used or removed

name: unused-variables
description: Variables declared but never used should be removed

name: unreachable-code
description: Code after return/raise is never executed

name: dead-conditional-branch
description: Condition branch can never be reached due to ordering

name: unused-function
description: Function defined but never used should be removed

name: commented-out-code
description: Remove commented-out code instead of keeping it - use version control

name: magic-numbers
description: Avoid hardcoded numeric literals - use named constants

name: hardcoded-credentials
description: Never hardcode passwords, tokens, or secrets in source code

name: hardcoded-timeouts
description: Avoid hardcoded timeout values - make them configurable

name: hardcoded-addresses
description: Do not hardcode IPs or URLs - use configuration

name: hardcoded-file-paths
description: Avoid hardcoded file system paths - use configuration

name: inconsistent-naming-conventions
description: Use consistent naming style following PEP 8

name: non-descriptive-names
description: Use meaningful variable/function names that describe purpose

name: too-short-variable-names
description: Avoid single-letter names except for simple loop counters

name: confusing-similar-names
description: Avoid similar variable names in same scope that can be confused

name: non-pep8-class-name
description: Class names should use CapWords/PascalCase convention

name: non-pep8-function-name
description: Function names should use snake_case convention

name: constant-not-uppercase
description: Constants should be UPPER_CASE with underscores

name: shadowing-builtins
description: Do not override built-in function names

name: nested-if-depth
description: Too many nested if statements reduce readability

name: merge-nested-if
description: Nested if statements with same condition can be combined

name: return-simplification
description: Boolean return can be simplified to direct condition

name: duplicate-condition-check
description: Same condition repeated in multiple branches should be consolidated

name: boolean-comparison-unnecessary
description: Explicit True/False comparison is redundant

name: unsafe-command-execution
description: Using shell commands with user input creates injection vulnerabilities

name: unsafe-subprocess-usage
description: shell=True with user input allows command injection

name: unsafe-eval-usage
description: eval() on user input executes arbitrary code

name: weak-hashing-algorithm
description: MD5 and SHA1 are broken for security purposes

name: insecure-password-storage
description: Plain or weakly hashed passwords are a security risk

name: insecure-random-generation
description: random module is not suitable for security purposes

name: predictable-token-generation
description: Time-based or sequential tokens are guessable

name: unsafe-encryption-practices
description: ECB mode encryption is insecure - use authenticated encryption

name: insecure-comparison-logic
description: Direct string equality for secrets is vulnerable to timing attacks

name: insecure-iv-handling
description: Fixed or predictable IVs weaken encryption security
